reasoning: The question asks if ZTS will close higher on 2026-04-05 compared to 2026-03-29. Since March 29 is a Sunday, the 'current' price is from Friday, March 27 (113.35). Good Friday in 2026 falls on April 3, meaning the stock market will be closed, so the final 'close price on 2026-04-05' will actually be measured on Thursday, April 2. This leaves a 4-day trading window. Research confirms there are no earnings reports, ex-dividend dates, or scheduled major announcements in this 4-day window. Over a brief 4-day interval with no scheduled news, a stock's price behaves almost entirely as a random walk. A slight upward bias (the historical equity risk premium) puts the base rate of a positive return around 51-52%. While the stock trended downwards over the last few months (setting a 12-month low on March 27), mean reversion and momentum effects roughly cancel out over such short horizons. Therefore, the most rationally calibrated probability is approximately 0.51.
